_notes: Catalogue of all cards, both common and character-specific. Loaded from JSON at runtime. JSON holds values (cp_cost, max_copies) and display text; card behaviour is implemented in code and referenced via the card 'id'. 'character_id' is null for common cards, or references character.id for character-specific cards. 'phase_subtype' only applies when phase is 'roll_phase' (offensive/defensive/any); it is null otherwise. 'max_copies' is omitted to use the global limit from game_config.json; include it only to override with a lower value.

cards.name: Helping Hand
cards.description: Select one of your opponent's dice and force them to re-roll it.

cards.name: Samesies
cards.description: Change the value of one of your dice to be identical to the value of another one of your dice (that was rolled in the same phase and for the same purpose).

cards.name: Twice As Wild
cards.description: Change the value of any two dice.

cards.name: Try, Try Again
cards.description: You or a chosen teammate may re-roll up to two dice (can be the same die twice in a row or two different dice).

cards.name: One More Time
cards.description: A chosen player may perform an additional Roll Attempt of up to five dice during their Offensive Roll Phase.

cards.name: So Wild
cards.description: Change the value of any one die.

cards.name: Six-It
cards.description: Change the value of any one of your dice to a 6.

cards.name: Not This Time
cards.description: A chosen player prevents 6 incoming damage.

cards.name: Better D
cards.description: A chosen player may perform an additional Roll Attempt of up to five dice during their Defensive Roll Phase.

cards.name: Double Up
cards.description: Draw 2 cards.

cards.name: Buh, Bye
cards.description: Remove a status effect token from a chosen player.

cards.name: Triple Up
cards.description: Draw 3 cards.

cards.name: Getting Paid
cards.description: Gain 2 combat points.

cards.name: Vegas Baby
cards.description: Roll 1 die: gain 1/2 the value as Combat Points (rounded up).

cards.name: Transference
cards.description: Transfer 1 status effect token from a chosen player to another chosen player.

cards.name: Get That Outa Here
cards.description: Remove a status effect token from a chosen player.

cards.name: What Status Effects?
cards.description: Remove all status effect tokens from a chosen player.

cards.name: Tip It!
cards.description: Increase or decrease any die by the value of 1 (a value of 1 cannot be decreased and a value of 6 cannot be increased).

cards.name: Saber Strike II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Saber Strike to Saber Strike II.

cards.name: Carpet Bomb II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Carpet Bomb to Carpet Bomb II.

cards.name: Profiteer II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Profiteer to Profiteer II.

cards.name: Strategic Approach II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Strategic Approach to Strategic Approach II.

cards.name: Flank II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Flank to Flank II.

cards.name: Maneuver II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Maneuver to Maneuver II.

cards.name: Exploit II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Exploit to Exploit II.

cards.name: Countermeasures II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Countermeasures to Countermeasures II.

cards.name: Countermeasures III
cards.description: Upgrade skill Countermeasures to Countermeasures III.

cards.name: Upper Hand
cards.description: Roll 1 die: on Medal, gain 4 Tactical Advantage; on any other outcome, draw 1 card.

cards.name: War Room
cards.description: Roll 1 die: gain 1/2 the die value as Tactical Advantage (rounded up).

cards.name: Bunker Up
cards.description: A chosen player gains Protect.

cards.name: Disengage
cards.description: Roll 1 die: on Saber, deal 2 damage to the attacker; on Flag, prevent 3 damage; on Medal, gain Protect. Play only after being attacked.

cards.name: Feigned Retreat
cards.description: Inflict Constrict on your attacker and prevent 3 incoming damage. Play only after being attacked.

cards.name: Ambush
cards.description: Gain 2 Tactical Advantage.

cards.name: Animalistic II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Animalistic to Animalistic II.

cards.name: Savage II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Savage to Savage II.

cards.name: Resuscitate II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Resuscitate to Resuscitate II.

cards.name: Feral Instincts II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Feral Instincts to Feral Instincts II.

cards.name: Onslaught II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Onslaught to Onslaught II.

cards.name: Feral II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Feral to Feral II.

cards.name: Predatory Advance II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Predatory Advance to Predatory Advance II.

cards.name: Maternal Bond II
cards.description: Upgrade skill Maternal Bond to Maternal Bond II.

cards.name: Maternal Bond III
cards.description: Upgrade skill Maternal Bond II to Maternal Bond III.

cards.name: Blood Bond
cards.description: Roll 3 dice: heal Nyra 1 HP, +1 for every Soul, +2 for every Tooth.

cards.name: Primal Roar
cards.description: Roll 1 die: on Tooth, heal Nyra 4 HP; on any other outcome, draw 1 card.

cards.name: Savage Slash
cards.description: Choose a player and roll 1 die: on Claw or Tooth, inflict 2 Bleed; otherwise inflict 1 Bleed.

cards.name: Pounce
cards.description: Roll 5 dice: add 1 damage for every Spear; on Claw, inflict Bleed. Attack modifier.

cards.name: Prowl
cards.description: Roll 1 die: on Spear, add 1 damage; on Claw, add 2 damage; on Soul, heal Nyra 1 HP; on Tooth, add 3 damage. Attack modifier.

cards.name: Resilient
cards.description: Gain Nyra's Bond.
